attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.CREATION_DATE, STG_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, STG_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, STG_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER, STG_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.PERSON_ID, STG_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
  $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F STG_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F,
  (
 select EFFECTIVE_END_DATE ,EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,PERSON_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F
 minus
 select EFFECTIVE_END_DATE ,EFFECTIVE_START_DATE ,PERSON_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE = STG_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE and  ACM.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE = STG_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE and ACM.PERSON_ID = STG_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.PERSON_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.G2C_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F)
